name: Customer Cohort Analysis
description: Track customer behavior by acquisition cohort for retention analysis

config.sql:
SELECT 
  customer_id,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', first_purchase_date) as cohort_month,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date) as order_month,
  order_amount,
  DATEDIFF('month', DATE_TRUNC('month', first_purchase_date), DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date)) as months_since_first_purchase
FROM {{input}}
ORDER BY cohort_month, months_since_first_purchase

SELECT 
  cohort_month,
  months_since_first_purchase as period_number,
  COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) as active_customers,
  COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) * 1.0 / 
    FIRST_VALUE(COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id)) OVER (PARTITION BY cohort_month ORDER BY months_since_first_purchase) as retention_rate
FROM {{input}}
GROUP BY cohort_month, months_since_first_purchase
ORDER BY cohort_month, months_since_first_purchase

SELECT 
  cohort_month,
  MAX(CASE WHEN period_number = 0 THEN active_customers ELSE 0 END) as month_0,
  MAX(CASE WHEN period_number = 1 THEN active_customers ELSE 0 END) as month_1,
  MAX(CASE WHEN period_number = 2 THEN active_customers ELSE 0 END) as month_2,
  MAX(CASE WHEN period_number = 3 THEN active_customers ELSE 0 END) as month_3,
  MAX(CASE WHEN period_number = 6 THEN active_customers ELSE 0 END) as month_6,
  MAX(CASE WHEN period_number = 12 THEN active_customers ELSE 0 END) as month_12
FROM {{input}}
GROUP BY cohort_month
ORDER BY cohort_month
